name: SIGN THE CARD (via DSCC)
subject: Let President Obama know you'll miss him:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
After eight great years, President Obama delivered an incredible farewell address. Now, it's our turn to tell him thanks. Please, take a moment to add a personal note to his card today. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed2e/2b07114c/4609608d/73687bd8/4250852784/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170110-SignDS-ProsHV")
---

| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed2e/2b07114c/4609608d/73687bd8/4250852784/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170110-SignDS-ProsHV")
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed2e/2b07114c/4609608d/73687bd8/4250852784/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170110-SignDS-ProsHV")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed2e/2b07114c/4609608d/73687bd8/4250852784/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170110-SignDS-ProsHV")

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170110-SignDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed2e/2b07114c/4609608d/73687bda/4250852784/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed2e/2b07114c/4609608d/73687bd5/4250852784/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed2e/2b07114c/4609608d/73687bd4/4250852784/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: RSVP to the Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
There is still time to enter to witness HISTORY. |

Friend, Did you see my tweet? Because I want as many of our tremendous supporters to be there as possible, I’m inviting you to enter to win a trip to Washington to see the Inauguration. Friend: you helped make this historic election possible, so I’d love for you to be there and witness it. Contribute $3 or more to help sustain our movement for the next four years, and you will automatically be entered for a trip to Washington, D.C. to watch the Inauguration. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President-Elect of the United States
ENTER NOW

NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here. Entries must be received between January 5, 2016 at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on January 18, 2016 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: Round trip airfare for the winner and one guest to Washington, D.C., hotel accommodations for two (2) nights for the winner and one guest and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor (approximate retail value $3,000). In addition, although the Presidential Swearing-In Ceremony is not part of the official prize package, Trump Make America Great Again Committee will have access to tickets. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915. This Sweepstakes is not affiliated with the 58th Presidential Inaugural Committee.
Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.
Unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email

name: Democrats.org
subject: Add your name: demand a full review of Trump's nominees
body:
Trump's nominees are on the Hill for confirmation this week.
---
**Republicans want to rush Donald Trump's nominees through the confirmation process before they've been fully vetted by the public and government ethics watchdogs. Add your name and stand with Senate Democrats to demand a full and thorough review of Trump's nominees:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Nominees1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170111_ew_nd&source=em_20170111_ew_nd")**
Friend --

Donald Trump is building a Cabinet in his own image -- billionaire CEOs, bankers, and mega-donors with complicated business relationships and financial holdings that have the potential to create unprecedented conflicts of interest.

The American people should feel confident that our government officials are acting in the country's best interest -- not looking out for their own bottom line. But with Senate Republicans trying to rush Trump's Cabinet nominees' confirmation hearings through as quickly as possible even though they haven't been thoroughly vetted, there's no telling how corrupt this administration has the potential to be.

**[Will you add your name to tell Senate Republicans this is unacceptable?](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Nominees1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+add+your+name+to+tell+Senate+Re&utm_campaign=em_20170111_ew_nd&source=em_20170111_ew_nd")**

We're not asking for much -- just that Mitch McConnell and his fellow Senate Republicans hold Trump's nominees to the same standards to which they have held others in the past. In fact, Senate Democratic Leader Chuck Schumer just sent McConnell's own letter from eight years ago (at the start of the Obama administration) back to him as a friendly reminder:

[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Nominees1keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170111_ew_nd&source=em_20170111_ew_nd")
Let's not forget: Donald Trump got away with never releasing his tax returns during his campaign for president, and will enter office in a matter of days with the American people still in the dark about his potential foreign business entanglements and conflicts of interest.

And since Trump is now the GOP's standard-bearer, I guess it shouldn't be surprising that his Cabinet picks are being held to the same level of scrutiny that he was -- which is to say, not much.

**So if you're standing with Senate Democrats in refusing to accept anything less than a comprehensive ethics review for Trump's nominees, add your name today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Nominees1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170111_ew_nd&source=em_20170111_ew_nd")**
Thanks for standing with us,

Eric

Eric Walker
Deputy Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1ef/4067b0a/233568c0c/7e79a6b4/3709987113/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170111_ew_nd&source=em_20170111_ew_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1ef/4067b0a/233568c0c/7e79a6b5/3709987113/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170111_ew_nd&source=em_20170111_ew_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1ef/4067b0a/233568c0c/7e79a6b2/3709987113/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170111_ew_nd&source=em_20170111_ew_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1ef/4067b0a/233568c0c/7e79a6b3/3709987113/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170111_ew_nd&source=em_20170111_ew_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: DNC Rapid Response
subject: BREAKING: Trump's conflicts of interest
body:
Trump says only reporters want to see his taxes.
---
**Call on Donald Trump to release his tax returns:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Tax-Returns1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170111_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170111_dnc2_nd")**
Friend --

A few moments ago, Donald Trump announced that he will not divest from his business interests or release his tax returns.

That means:

1. Donald Trump and his family will continue to profit from new business deals that will be conducted while he is president.
2. Foreign governments and entities will be able to directly curry favor with Trump by doing business with his company.
3. We don't know if Trump has financial ties to Russia or other countries that will cloud how he conducts foreign policy.

When asked, Trump claimed that nobody other than journalists wants to see his tax returns.

That's just not true -- releasing his returns is the only way the American people can know for certain if he will follow even the most basic ethical standards.

**Donald Trump owes it to the country to prove -- before he takes office -- that he has no conflicts of interest that will affect the decisions he makes as president. Sign your name to demand that Donald Trump release his tax returns before January 20th:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Trump-Tax-Returns1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170111_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170111_dnc2_nd")**
Thanks,

The Democrats

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1e8/4067b0a/23313206b/7e79a9f1/1915187373/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170111_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170111_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1e8/4067b0a/23313206b/7e79a9fe/1915187373/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170111_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170111_dnc2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1e8/4067b0a/23313206b/7e79a9ff/1915187373/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170111_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170111_dnc2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c1e8/4067b0a/23313206b/7e79a9fc/1915187373/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170111_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170111_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: =?UTF-8?Q?donaldjtrump=2Ecom?=
subject: Official Inauguration Buttons inside
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Get your Inauguration button set today. |

Friend, If you haven’t gotten your hands on Official Inauguration merchandise yet, it’s not too late... Get the Official Inauguration Presidential Button set today to commemorate this historic event. Proudly wear your set of 6 buttons on Inauguration Day and have as a keepsake for years to come. Let President-Elect Trump know you’re standing by him and excited for his leadership. Grab your Official Inauguration Presidential Button Set today, exclusively from the Inaugural Collection. Thank you, Alex Trump Store Manager

Get Your Buttons

name: did-you-see@dscc.org
subject: Add your name: Tell President Obama you'll miss him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Last night President Obama said that it had been the honor of his life to serve us. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed36/2b07114c/461bfa26/73686100/292118425/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170111-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV")
---
Friend -- Last night President Obama said that it had been the honor of his life to serve us. Today, we want to _make sure he knows_ how honored we were to have him as our president.

[**Will you take a moment to sign the card and let him know you'll miss him? You can even include a personal note. Add your name >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed36/2b07114c/461bfa26/73686100/292118425/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170111-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV")

\- Team DSCC

\------------------
Forwarded message:
From: SIGN THE CARD (via DSCC)
Date: Tuesday, January 10, 2017
Subject: Let President Obama know you'll miss him

| [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed36/2b07114c/461bfa26/73686100/292118425/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170111-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV")
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed36/2b07114c/461bfa26/73686100/292118425/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170111-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV")
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed36/2b07114c/461bfa26/73686100/292118425/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/thank-you-president-obama?source=PT-20170111-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV")

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170111-DidYouSee_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed36/2b07114c/461bfa26/73686102/292118425/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed36/2b07114c/461bfa26/7368617d/292118425/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed36/2b07114c/461bfa26/7368617c/292118425/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: OurRevolution.com
subject: Will you tune in to watch Bernie's speech on Sunday?
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Republicans in Congress have made it a top priority to repeal the Affordable Care Act, defund Planned Parenthood and make huge cuts to Medicaid and Medicare, putting 30 million Americans at risk of losing their health care.
We need to show them that they are not going to get away with it.
**That's why this Sunday, January 15, Our Revolution is hosting a livestream featuring Bernie's rally that's part of a national day of action called "Our First Stand: Save Health Care."**
[**Will you tune in to watch Bernie's speech on Sunday?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170111-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170111-full")
**[YES, I'LL TUNE IN»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170111-full "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/Bernie-health-care-rally?source=em170111-full")**
There will be dozens of events across the country where people will come together to tell Republicans that they cannot take away health care from tens of millions of Americans.
We hope you'll join us by tuning in to the livestream to watch Bernie's speech and help fight back against Republican attacks on health care.
In solidarity,
The team at Our Revolution
** **

** **
** **
** **

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").
